reviews.comment:
El lugar y la atención excelente,lo que no me gusto que es raro el baño de caballeros,roto el boton del inodoro
y no habia jabon,dado las condiciones relacionadas con la pandemia deberia estar mas cuidado.

(Translated by Google)
The place and service were excellent, but what I didn't like was the men's restroom; the toilet button was broken, and there was no soap. Given the pandemic, it should be better maintained.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5OE1TdXBRRRAB
